property.name: salesTransactionItems
property.label: Sales Transaction Items (Input)
property.description: Collection of SalesTransactionItem records received from the Data Manager.

property.name: transactionRecord
property.label: Transaction Record (Input)
property.description: Transaction record received from the Data Manager.

property.name: attributeCategories
property.label: Attribute Categories (Input)
property.description: Collection of AttributeCategory records received from the Data Manager.

property.name: optionGroups
property.label: Option Groups (Input)
property.description: Collection of OptionGroup records received from the Data Manager.

property.name: summary
property.label: Transaction Summary (Input)
property.description: Pricing summary received from the Data Manager.

property.name: autoAttributeUpdatesJSON
property.label: Auto Attribute Updates JSON
property.description: JSON string containing auto-attribute update instructions from custom metadata. Each entry has attributeCode, attributeValue, productCode, and step.
